Private by design

Many tools run locally in your browser. Your files stay on your device.

Fast and simple

This tool is free. Sharing it keeps it that way.

No subscriptions. No accounts. Just useful tools.

WhatsApp X

Free Online Tools for Images, Text, PDFs and More

PixMidas is a growing collection of free browser-based tools built for everyday digital tasks. Compress and resize images, convert between formats, generate QR codes, count words, merge PDFs, pick colors, compare text differences and more — all without installing software, creating an account or uploading your files to a server.

Privacy is a first principle here. Most tools process your files entirely on your device using browser APIs. Your images, documents and text stay on your machine. Nothing is transmitted, logged or stored. Fast, simple and private by design.

Image Tools

Compress JPG, PNG and WebP images to reduce file size without visible quality loss. Resize photos to exact pixel dimensions. Crop images by drawing a selection. Convert between PNG, JPG and WebP formats. Check image dimensions and file size. Convert WebP images to JPG for maximum compatibility.

PDF Tools

Convert PDF pages to JPG images. Combine multiple images into a single PDF. Merge several PDF files into one document. All PDF processing runs in the browser — no cloud upload required.

Text Tools

Count words, characters and sentences in real time. Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase, snake_case and kebab-case. Compare two texts side by side and highlight every difference. Generate lorem ipsum placeholder text for layouts and mockups.

Developer Tools

Format and validate JSON data. Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings. Generate QR codes for any URL, text, email or phone number. Create strong random passwords. Pick colors and get HEX, RGB and HSL codes.
